name: bogibox Golf Woodbury
about: Bogibox Golf Woodbury is a members-only facility that provides 24/7 access to private golf simulator bays. The venue utilizes top-of-the-line TrackMan technology within a comfortable, luxurious environment designed for quality time with friends and family. This exclusive, high-end experience caters primarily to its member community, offering a personalized schedule and a clubhouse-like atmosphere.
why_golfers_like_it: Exclusively for members for a tailored experience

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on-site.
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB status is not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium technology used for simulation, though specific model is not detailed.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You do not need to bring your own clubs. Bogibox provides club rentals and a club fitting service to all members.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not mention food or alcohol service, so guests are encouraged to inquire directly about bringing their own items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 24/7 access and multiple simulator bays, you can play at your own pace. The time for 18 holes will vary based on the number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bogibox is described as a comfortable environment for spending quality time with friends and family, making it suitable for kids.
